questions.q: Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni announced that Italy is suspending the automatic renewal of its defence agreement with which country?
In an escalating monopoly battle reported on April 14, 2026, what specific group is demanding billions of dollars from Google through a mass arbitration proceeding?
Famous for being rescued from a well as a toddler in 1987, "Baby Jessica" was arrested at age 40 on assault charges following a domestic disturbance in which state?
A Florida doctor was recently indicted for manslaughter after mistakenly removing which organ instead of a patient's spleen?
Prime Minister Mark Carney announced his government will temporarily suspend what federal tax starting on April 20, 2026?
options: The federal excise tax on gas and diesel
The federal carbon tax on home heating
The federal sales tax on groceries
The capital gains tax on primary residences
questions.correctText: The federal excise tax on gas and diesel

questions.q: Researchers in April 2026 created an extensive open database revealing that microbes have an almost universal potential to biodegrade plastics, identifying over how many capable microbial proteins?
According to new research from April 2026, rice will physically cease to function in traditional growing regions by 2070 when temperatures exceed what heat threshold?
Vancouver Mayor Ken Sim announced he is bringing forward a motion to council aiming to bring an expansion team from which professional sports league to the city?
Which US YouTuber was jailed in South Korea in April 2026 for being a 'public nuisance' after kissing a statue representing World War Two sex slaves?
An undercover investigation caught a hospital reusing syringes, which is linked to an HIV outbreak among over 300 children in which country?
